title: potentilla lagascana
intro: Potentilla lagascana, also known as the Mexican Cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla lagascana include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments such as skin issues and respiratory problems.
